name: maxLength counts codepoints, not UTF-16 code units
note: Input is a single astral-plane codepoint (U+1F600, surrogate pair in UTF-16/JS). BE (respect Length via mb_strlen) counts it as 1 codepoint => valid. FE checkMaxLength uses .length (UTF-16 code units = 2) => currently invalid. Target = codepoint count on both sides (resolved in format-assertion fix).
